title: Full Stack Developer
description: Full Stack Developer (.NET & React) Ekibimize katılacak, modern yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine hakim, backend ve frontend tarafında güçlü bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyonda geliştirme sürecimizi Claude Code ile AI destekli geliştirme üzerine kuruyoruz. Adayın Claude Code ile aktif çalışma deneyimine sahip olması ve bu aracı günlük geliştirme akışına entegre edebilmesi bu rol için zorunludur. Aradığımız Profil •	Minimum 3 yıl yazılım geliştirme deneyimi •  Claude Code ile aktif çalışma deneyimine sahip • Daha önce bir Webapp'te bulunmuş ve geliştirmiş •	.NET (Core / 6 / 7 / 8) teknolojilerine hakim •	React.js ile modern frontend geliştirme deneyimi •	RESTful API mimarisi konusunda tecrübeli •	Microservice mimarisi konusunda bilgi sahibi •	SQL (MSSQL / PostgreSQL) deneyimi •	Git versiyon kontrol sistemine hakim Tercihen •	Cloud & DevOps süreçlerinde deneyim •	DigitalOcean •	Azure DevOps •	CI/CD pipeline süreçlerini kurmuş veya yönetmiş •	Container teknolojileri (Docker) bilgisi •	Message broker tecrübesi: •	RabbitMQ •	Kafka •	Event-driven architecture bilgisi Teknik Yetkinlikler •	OOP ve SOLID prensiplerine hakim •	Clean Code yaklaşımını benimseyen •	Unit test yazma konusunda deneyimli •	Performans optimizasyonu yapabilen •	Agile / Scrum metodolojisine yatkın Sorumluluklar •	Backend servislerin geliştirilmesi ve iyileştirilmesi •	React tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzlerinin geliştirilmesi •	Mevcut sistemlerin performans ve güvenlik iyileştirmeleri •	Cloud ortamında deployment süreçlerine destek verilmesi •	Yazılım mimarisi karar süreçlerine katkı sağlanması Ekibimizde yer almak üzere ''Full Stack Developer'' takım arkadaşı arıyoruz.

title: Backend Developer
description: Kariyer yolculuğunda, Blueprint Ailesi'ne "Back-End Developer” olarak değer katacak ekip üyesi arıyoruz. Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, Alanında minimum 1 yıl tecrübeli, LLM kavramları ve prompt engineering konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak LLM’ler (ör. OpenAI / Azure OpenAI) ve prompt engineering teknikleri kullanarak yapay zekâ destekli çözümler geliştirmek .Net Framework, .Net Core 3+ konularında deneyimli, MSSQL, MongoDB veya PostgreSQL db konularında bilgi sahibi, Servis Odaklı Mimari (SOA) konusunda bilgiye sahip, WebApi, SOAP ve RESTful servislerinde deneyime sahip, Teknik dokümantasyonu takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip. Kişisel Nitelikler Teknolojik gelişmeleri takip eden ve öğrenmeye açık, Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yeteneği kuvvetli, İletişim yeteneği güçlü ve takım çalışmasına yatkın. Rol Tanımı Yeni projelerin yazılımı ve geliştirmesi konusunda destek olmak, Kurum içerisinde geliştirilen mevcut uygulamaların yazılım geliştirme desteğini vermek, Geliştirme süreci boyunca test, canlıya alma, bakım ve destek süreçlerinde teknik ekipler ile iş birliği içinde olmak. Blueprint olarak en önemli değerimizin "İnsan" olduğunu biliyoruz. Bu kapsamda; işe alım ve istihdamda herhangi bir ayrımcılık yapmaksızın, tüm adaylara fırsat eşitliği sağlıyor, yetenek ve yetkinliğe dayalı işe alımı taahhüt ediyoruz.

title: Senior Backend Developer (Remote)
description: About Merzigo Merzigo is a cutting-edge video monetization company, that provides a range of innovative services to broadcasters, producers, and distributors. They focus on supporting leading entertainment brands to grow their AVOD business, finding them new audiences, and increasing revenue streams. Our company is dedicated to inclusion, diversity, and equality. By bringing together individuals with various backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives, we aim to create an innovative and dynamic work environment. Everyone must feel valued and respected, as this is a crucial component in strengthening team spirit. We strive to give all our employees equal opportunities to reach their full potential in an inclusive atmosphere. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or Computer Science. At least 8 years of software development experience, Minimum of 2 years of DevOps experience, Proficiency in .NET Core, C#, ASP.NET MVC, and Web API, with hands-on project experience. Experience with frontend technologies such as React.js is a plus, Strong knowledge of OOP/AOP, Design Patterns, and SOLID principles, Familiarity with DDD, CQRS, CQRS/ES, Clean Architecture, Event-Driven Architecture, FluentValidation, MediatR, and Dapper, Experience in developing according to microservice architecture and coding standards, Proficiency in developing API Gateways using Ocelot, Experience in building background job and scheduling systems such as Hangfire, Familiarity with ORM tools such as Entity Framework, Experience with NoSQL technologies such as Redis, MongoDB, and Elasticsearch, Proficiency in RDBMS technologies such as MSSQL, PostgreSQL, and MySQL, Familiarity with messaging technologies such as RabbitMQ and Kafka, Experience with software development, CI/CD, code quality, and source control tools such as Git, TFS, Bitbucket, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, and SonarQube, Experience with real-time communication technologies such as SignalR, Knowledge of coding standards, secure coding practices, cybersecurity principles, and mitigation of attacks such as DDoS and brute-force attacks, Hands-on experience using AI-assisted development tools in daily software engineering workflows, Experience working in Agile environments using Scrum and adhering to SDLC processes. Responsibilities Participate in product development, integration, and deployment processes, Collaborate effectively with team members to develop efficient and high-quality code, Contribute to technical documentation, Write unit tests for developed modules, Deliver challenging projects on time while maintaining high-quality standards and alignment with the product roadmap, Ensure customer satisfaction, Monitor the successful completion of processes such as testing and deployment, and take necessary actions to resolve any issues that arise, Generate new ideas to develop new applications or improve existing applications and processes; develop PoC (Proof of Concept) applications when necessary to demonstrate these ideas, Research new technologies and share knowledge, ideas, and innovations with the team, Actively use AI-assisted development tools (e.g., code generation, code review support, and test generation) as part of day-to-day software development. We welcome candidates who share this mission to join us.

title: Full Stack AI Engineer
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Full Stack AI Engineer based in Turkey. This is an exciting opportunity for a highly motivated engineer to join a fast-paced, AI-focused environment where innovation, experimentation, and rapid execution are at the heart of every project. In this role, you will work on building intelligent applications, AI-powered workflows, and scalable products that help validate new ideas and accelerate business growth. You will collaborate closely with founders, product leaders, and technical teams to transform complex concepts into functional solutions. The position offers significant autonomy, exposure to cutting-edge AI technologies, and the chance to contribute to a growing ecosystem of reusable tools and frameworks. Ideal candidates thrive in dynamic environments, enjoy solving ambiguous challenges, and are passionate about delivering impactful products quickly. This role is well suited for engineers who want to shape the future of AI-driven products while working with a highly experienced and collaborative team. Accountabilities Design, develop, and deploy AI-powered applications, agent-based systems, and full-stack solutions. Build and iterate rapidly on prototypes, proofs of concept, and minimum viable products to validate ideas and market opportunities. Experiment with AI frameworks, large language model technologies, open-source tools, and low-code platforms to deliver effective solutions. Collaborate directly with stakeholders to translate business needs and product concepts into scalable technical implementations. Contribute to the development and maintenance of shared libraries, reusable components, prompts, and internal frameworks. Support product launches and provide technical expertise across multiple projects when needed. Continuously optimize workflows, improve product performance, and identify opportunities for innovation. Requirements Proven experience developing applications using Python and modern AI tools, frameworks, and APIs. Strong background in building and rapidly iterating on MVPs, prototypes, or experimental products. Experience working with a combination of commercial AI services, open-source technologies, and automation tools. Excellent problem-solving abilities with strong analytical and critical-thinking skills. Ability to work independently in a remote, asynchronous, and high-autonomy environment. Strong communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders. Experience with AI agents, vector databases, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), or similar technologies is highly valued. Familiarity with frontend development technologies such as React, Next.js, or related frameworks is a plus. Background in STEM, data science, machine learning, or quantitative engineering disciplines is advantageous. Previous experience in startup environments, high-growth organizations, or founder-led teams is preferred. Benefits Competitive contract compensation during the initial evaluation period. Opportunity to transition into a long-term full-time or retainer-based engagement based on performance and mutual fit. Fully remote work environment with location flexibility. High level of ownership, autonomy, and exposure to impactful projects. Collaboration with experienced professionals across AI, product development, and infrastructure. Access to cutting-edge technologies, tools, and innovative product initiatives. Fast-moving culture focused on learning, experimentation, and continuous growth. Opportunity to contribute to a diverse portfolio of AI-driven products and ventures. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Backend Developer / AI-First
description: About Kaizen Kaizen Technology is a fast-growing B2B SaaS company building loyalty and engagement platforms that drive measurable user behavior and business growth. Operating across Istanbul and London, we work with leading brands such as Anadolu Efes, Ferrero, Nestlé, and Coca-Cola, reaching over 20 million users through our platforms. What This Role Is A deeply technical backend engineering role, scalable APIs, event-driven systems, multi-tenant architecture, cloud-native infrastructure. But it's more than writing great backend code. AI tools are already in use across our team. Your job is to take that further: build the workflows, set the standards, and mentor engineers so that AI-augmented development becomes the norm not the exception. We're not looking for someone who uses AI well alone. We're looking for someone who makes the whole team better at it. What You'll Work On Designing and building scalable .NET backend services powering loyalty, rewards, and gamification flows Evolving our multi-tenant SaaS architecture for performance and maintainability Integrating AI-assisted tooling into development workflows; code generation, refactoring, testing, documentation Working with event systems (RabbitMQ / Azure Service Bus) and distributed architectures Collaborating closely with the CTO and FE team on platform decisions Hard Requirements What We're Looking For 5-8 years of backend engineering experience in production environments Strong hands-on expertise in .NET / C# Active daily use of AI development tools (GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) Awareness of AI limitations and hallucinations, you know when to trust the output and when to validate it Proven experience with scalable API design and distributed systems Solid understanding of SQL (SQL Server preferred), caching (Redis), and ORM tools (EF Core) Cloud experience: Azure or AWS (hands-on, not just familiarity) CI/CD and DevOps comfort — you've deployed, monitored, debugged in production Strong Plus Experience with multi-tenant SaaS architecture LLM API integration (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI) Kubernetes / containerized environments Messaging systems: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus Experience in loyalty, marketing automation, or engagement platforms What We Offer Opportunity to shape a growing global SaaS platform Direct impact on products used by millions of users A product-driven engineering culture Close collaboration with product, UX and engineering teams Ownership-oriented working environment Opportunity to work on scalable cloud-native platform systems What’s in It for You? 🌍 Remote-friendly – Work from anywhere 💰 Competitive salary + performance-based bonus – Your success is rewarded! 🌟 Flexible benefits – Spend it on what fits your lifestyle, whether it’s wellness, sports, or insurance for your furry companion. 📚 Learning & development opportunities – Grow with us. 🎉 A fun, dynamic team – Work with smart, driven people who love what they do.

title: Python Backend Developer (Medior)
description: Python Backend Developer (Medior) Çalışma Modeli: Hibrit Tercih Edilen Lokasyon: İzmir Deneyim Seviyesi: Medior / Senior İstihdam Türü: Tam Zamanlı Pozisyon Hakkında Yüksek performanslı, ölçeklenebilir ve güvenilir yazılım çözümleri geliştiren ekibimize katılacak deneyimli bir Python Backend Developer arıyoruz. Bu pozisyonda, mikroservis mimarileri üzerinde çalışan projelerin geliştirilmesi, devreye alınması ve işletilmesi süreçlerinde aktif rol alacak; modern yazılım geliştirme prensiplerini kullanarak ürünlerimizin teknik altyapısının güçlendirilmesine katkı sağlayacaksınız. İhtiyaç halinde ekip içi teknik toplantılar ve proje değerlendirmeleri için İzmir’de yüz yüze bir araya gelinmektedir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar - Ubuntu tabanlı sistemlerde (tercihen Ubuntu 20 ve üzeri) yazılım geliştirme, kurulum, test, devreye alma ve operasyon süreçlerini yürütmek. - Python tabanlı backend servisleri geliştirmek ve mevcut sistemlerin bakımını yapmak. - Mikroservis, dağıtık sistem ve yüksek erişilebilirlik mimarileri üzerinde çalışmak. - CI/CD süreçlerinin tasarımı, geliştirilmesi ve yönetilmesine katkı sağlamak. - RESTful API ve web servislerinin geliştirilmesi, entegrasyonu ve dokümantasyonunu gerçekleştirmek. - Uygulama performansını izlemek, iyileştirmek ve hata ayıklama süreçlerini yönetmek. - GitHub veya GitLab üzerinden kaynak kod yönetimi ve takım içi geliştirme süreçlerine katılmak. - Postman veya benzeri araçlarla API testleri gerçekleştirmek, test koleksiyonları ve teknik dokümantasyon hazırlamak. - Proje yönetim araçları üzerinden görev takibi yapmak, teknik çözüm önerileri geliştirmek ve süreçleri sonuçlandırmak. Aranan Nitelikler - Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun olmak. - Alternatif olarak, farklı bir bölüm mezunu olup yazılım alanında sertifika programları veya sınavlı eğitimlerle uzmanlığını belgeleyebilmek. - En az 3 yıl Python ve SQL kullanarak backend geliştirme deneyimi. - Python 3.8+ ve PostgreSQL 12+ teknolojileriyle çalışma tecrübesi. - Web servisleri, REST API geliştirme ve entegrasyon konularında deneyim sahibi olmak. - GitHub veya GitLab kullanımına hakim olmak. - Teknik dokümanları anlayabilecek, oluşturabilecek ve günlük iş süreçlerinde kullanabilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisi. - Analitik düşünme becerisi yüksek, problem çözme odaklı ve güçlü iletişim yeteneklerine sahip olmak. Tercih Sebepleri - Python’da multithreading, multiprocessing ve kaynak yönetimi konularında deneyim sahibi olmak. - Dağıtık sistemler ve yüksek performanslı uygulamalar geliştirmiş olmak. - Görüntü işleme, görüntü manipülasyonu ve OCR teknolojileri üzerine çalışmış olmak. - Docker, Kubernetes ve bulut tabanlı altyapılar konusunda bilgi sahibi olmak. - Agile/Scrum metodolojileriyle çalışma deneyimi bulunmak. Neler Sunuyoruz? - Uzaktan çalışma imkânı ve esnek çalışma kültürü. - Yenilikçi ve teknoloji odaklı projelerde görev alma fırsatı. - Teknik gelişimi destekleyen çalışma ortamı. - Karar alma süreçlerinde aktif rol oynayabileceğiniz dinamik ekip yapısı. - Kariyer gelişimi ve uzun vadeli büyüme fırsatları. Yukarıdaki niteliklere sahip olduğunuzu düşünüyorsanız, ekibimizin bir parçası olmak için başvurunuzu bekliyoruz.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Full Stack Developer (TypeScript / Next.js / NestJS) Turgut Reis Denizcilik Eğitim Kurumu olarak, mikro servis tabanlı üniversite yönetim platformumuzu geliştirecek, mevcut sistemlerimizi ölçeklendirecek ve yeni dijital projelerimizi hayata geçirecek bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Modern bir monorepo mimarisi (Turborepo) üzerinde, 7 Next.js uygulaması, 24 NestJS mikro servis ve paylaşımlı paketlerden oluşan kapsamlı bir ekosistemde çalışacaksınız. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Öğrenci, eğitmen, admin, CRM ve muhasebe portallerinin (Next.js 16 / React 19 / Tailwind CSS 4) geliştirilmesi ve sürdürülebilirliğinin sağlanması NestJS 11 ile mikro servis tabanlı back-end geliştirme; servisler arası senkron (API Gateway) ve asenkron (RabbitMQ event bus) iletişim akışlarının kurulması Front-end ve back-end süreçlerinin uçtan uca, tip güvenli (TypeScript strict mode) bir şekilde yürütülmesi PostgreSQL veritabanı tasarımı, TypeORM entity/migration yönetimi ve veri katmanının optimize edilmesi Redis (cache/session), RabbitMQ (mesaj kuyruğu) ve MinIO (nesne depolama) entegrasyonlarının geliştirilmesi Mevcut sistemlerin performans, güvenlik (JWT/RBAC, KVKK uyumlu PII şifreleme) ve kullanıcı deneyimi açısından iyileştirilmesi Docker ile konteynerizasyon ve Kubernetes üzerinde deployment süreçlerine katkı Jest ile birim/E2E testlerinin yazılması ve test kapsamının sürdürülmesi Dijital pazarlama ve tasarım ekipleriyle koordineli çalışarak yeni projelerin (CRM, reklam atribüsyonu, dinamik içerik yönetimi) hayata geçirilmesi Teknik dokümantasyon ve kod standartlarının (ESLint 9, Prettier) uygulanması Aranan Nitelikler Full Stack geliştirme alanında deneyim sahibi TypeScript ve modern React / Next.js (App Router) ekosistemine hakim Node.js tabanlı back-end framework'leri (tercihen NestJS) ve RESTful API geliştirme konusunda bilgi sahibi PostgreSQL ve ilişkisel veritabanı yönetimi (tercihen ORM — TypeORM/Prisma) konusunda deneyimli Mikro servis mimarisi, mesaj kuyrukları (RabbitMQ vb.) ve cache (Redis) konularına aşina Docker ve konteyner tabanlı geliştirme süreçlerinde tecrübeli; Kubernetes bilgisi artı değer Git tabanlı versiyon kontrolü ve monorepo (Turborepo/Nx vb.) yapılarına yatkın Test odaklı geliştirme (Jest vb.) ve CI/CD pratiklerine aşina Problem çözme becerisi yüksek, analitik düşünebilen Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve sorumluluk sahibi Tercihen kurumsal ölçekli projelerde görev almış Çalışma Bilgileri Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı – Ofisten Çalışma Konum: Tuzla, İstanbul Çalışma Saatleri: Hafta içi 09.00 – 17.00 Önemli Not: Bu pozisyon için uzaktan çalışma veya hibrit çalışma modeli bulunmamaktadır. Adayların tam zamanlı olarak ofiste görev alması beklenmektedir. Denizcilik sektörünün köklü eğitim kurumlarından biri olan Turgut Reis Denizcilik Eğitim Kurumu'nun dijital geleceğini birlikte şekillendirmek için başvurularınızı bekliyoruz.

title: Sr. Full Stack Developer
description: About Cypien AI Cypien AI is an AI-native personalization and conversion platform built on a Two-Brain Architecture — an Analytics Brain that understands user behavior in real time and a Generative Brain that produces tailored content and experiences. We let brands deploy enterprise-grade personalization with a single integration script and a 15-minute setup, making capabilities that were once reserved for large tech teams accessible to companies of any size. We're pushing into generative commerce — AI-driven shopping experiences where product discovery, merchandising, recommendations, and storefront content are generated and personalized for each user in real time. It's one of the most exciting parts of our roadmap, and this role sits right at the center of building it. We're a product-driven team that ships fast, owns problems end to end, and cares deeply about developer experience, performance, and craft. The Role We're looking for a Senior Full Stack Developer who is genuinely balanced across the stack — equally comfortable building polished, performant interfaces and designing robust, scalable backend services. You'll work across our product surface: from the customer-facing client SDK and BackOffice UI to the APIs, data pipelines, and AI integration layer that power them. This is a high-ownership role on a distributed team. You'll help shape architecture decisions, mentor other engineers, and have direct impact on a product used in real-time, high-throughput environments. What You'll Do Design, build, and ship full stack features end to end — from API and data model through to UI. Develop and maintain our frontend applications (BackOffice UI, dashboards, client-facing components) with a strong focus on performance and UX. Build and scale backend services and APIs that handle high event volumes with low latency. Integrate and orchestrate our AI/ML layer (multi-model support, content generation, personalization) into product features. Build generative commerce experiences — dynamic product discovery, AI-generated merchandising, recommendations, and personalized storefront content. Contribute to architectural decisions around scalability, reliability, and microservices evolution. Improve observability, testing, and CI/CD practices across the codebase. Collaborate closely with product, data, and AI teams in an async-first, distributed setting. Mentor engineers through code review, pairing, and technical guidance. Our Tech Stack You don't need to know every item below, but you should be strong across a meaningful slice of both frontend and backend, and able to ramp quickly on the rest. Frontend React 19, TypeScript, Vite Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Radix UI Redux Toolkit, TanStack Query, React Hook Form Backend Python 3.12 with FastAPI Node.js (LTS) GraphQL (Apollo Server) Celery, Redis, BullMQ for queues and background processing Rust for performance-critical analytics (nice to have) Data MySQL 8.0, PostgreSQL Redis AWS S3 AI / ML LangChain and our in-house abstraction layer (Cylink) Multi-model orchestration (OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Meta Llama, plus our own models) Guardrails and vision/tagging models Infrastructure Docker & Docker Compose GitHub Actions (CI/CD) AWS (CloudFront and related services) Prometheus & custom analytics for monitoring What We're Looking For (MUST) Direct experience at a customer engagement, personalization, or web experience optimization SaaS platform — i.e. a martech product company building real-time personalization, A/B testing, recommendation, messaging, or CRO products at scale. This background is essential; candidates without it will not be considered. 5+ years of professional software engineering experience, with demonstrable full stack ownership. Strong command of TypeScript and modern React, plus solid backend experience in Python and/or Node.js. Experience designing and building APIs (REST and/or GraphQL) and relational data models. Comfort working with queues, caching, and asynchronous processing at scale. A track record of shipping production software in high-throughput or real-time systems. Sound judgment on architecture, trade-offs, performance, and maintainability. Self-direction and strong written communication — you thrive in an async, remote-first team. Fluent professional English. Nice to Have Hands-on experience integrating LLMs or building AI-powered product features. Familiarity with Rust or other systems-level languages. Experience with microservices migrations and GraphQL Federation. Background in marketing technology, personalization, or analytics platforms. Experience with e-commerce, generative commerce, or recommendation/merchandising systems. Why Join Us Fully remote, global — work from wherever you do your best work. Real ownership — you'll influence product and architecture, not just close tickets. Modern stack — work with current tooling and a serious AI layer, on a product where engineering quality is the product. Impact — your work ships to real users in production, fast. How to Apply Send us your CV along with a short note on a full stack project you're proud of — what you built, the decisions you made, and your role in it. Links to GitHub, a portfolio, or relevant work are very welcome. 🚀
